jei.iska_utils.arcane_trait.meta.title: %1$s (%2$s–%3$s)
jei.iska_utils.arcane_trait.iska_utils.g: Reflects %1$s magic damage to attackers at level I, %2$s at V.
You take %1$s extra damage when hit at I, %2$s at V.
jei.iska_utils.arcane_trait.iska_utils.l: Applies Luck I–%1$s (amplifier scales with level).
jei.iska_utils.arcane_trait.iska_utils.u: Applies Bad Luck I–%1$s (amplifier scales with level).
jei.iska_utils.arcane_trait.iska_utils.a: +%1$s movement speed at I, +%2$s at V.
jei.iska_utils.arcane_trait.iska_utils.b: Regeneration while at or below %1$s health.
jei.iska_utils.arcane_trait.iska_utils.v: Reflects %1$s–%2$s magic damage to melee attackers.
jei.iska_utils.arcane_trait.iska_utils.e: Bonus vs targets at or below %1$s health.
+%1$s bonus damage at I, +%2$s at V.
Ignores %1$s of armor at I, %2$s at V.
jei.iska_utils.arcane_trait.iska_utils.m: +%1$s damage dealt at I, +%2$s at V.
+%1$s damage taken at I, +%2$s at V.
jei.iska_utils.arcane_trait.iska_utils.r: +%1$s experience from orbs at I, +%2$s at V.
jei.iska_utils.arcane_trait.iska_utils.p: %1$s chance to negate a hit at I, %2$s at V.
jei.iska_utils.arcane_trait.iska_utils.e: Other traits cost %1$s less entropy consume at I, %2$s at V.
Max HP %1$s at I, %2$s at V.
jei.iska_utils.arcane_trait.iska_utils.s: Its power is indeterminable, but always positive; shifts every %1$s seconds.
jei.iska_utils.arcane_trait.iska_utils.l: Heals %1$s of damage dealt at I, %2$s at V (per hit cap applies).
Heal capped at %1$s HP per hit.
jei.iska_utils.arcane_trait.iska_utils.i: +%1$s knockback resistance at I, +%2$s at V.
jei.iska_utils.arcane_trait.iska_utils.q: +%1$s attack speed at I, +%2$s at V.
jei.iska_utils.arcane_trait.iska_utils.e: +%1$s to +%2$s extra entropy charges per absorbed drop (per level).
jei.iska_utils.arcane_trait.iska_utils.l: Resistance while at or below %1$s health.
jei.iska_utils.arcane_trait.iska_utils.g: Bonus movement speed while at or below %1$s health.
+%1$s movement speed at I, +%2$s at V (when wounded).
jei.iska_utils.arcane_trait.iska_utils.t: Other traits cost %1$s less entropy consume at I, %2$s at V (per Apotheosis tier step above Haven).
Stronger at higher Apotheosis world tiers (Frontier → Pinnacle).
Requires Apotheosis to appear in the trait pool.
message.iska_utils.ancient_tablet.wrong_: Wrong component order in the tablet.
Wrong component order. The tablet contents were destroyed.
message.iska_utils.arcane_dictionary.no_: You need experience to reroll arcane traits.
No arcane traits loaded from datapacks.
tooltip.iska_utils.arcane_trait.iska_uti: Reflects magic damage; you take extra damage when hit.
Grants vanilla Luck while active (I–V).
Grants vanilla Bad Luck while active (I–V).
Adds flat armor while active.
+1 armor toughness per level; −2 HP (fixed).
Increases movement speed with level.
Regeneration below a health threshold.
Reflects magic damage to melee attackers.
Bonus damage against low-health targets.
Ignores part of enemy armor on hit.
Increases damage dealt and taken.
Bonus experience from XP orbs.
Chance to negate an incoming hit.
Indeterminable, always positive; shifts every 30 seconds.
Reduces max HP per level; lowers entropy consume of your other traits.
Heals a fraction of damage you deal.
Increases knockback resistance with level.
Increases attack speed with level.
Absorbs extra entropy charges from each Drop of Entropy.
Resistance while at low health.
Slowness at high health; movement speed when wounded.
Lowers entropy consume of other traits based on Apotheosis world tier.

message.iska_utils.vector_vertical_facto: Vector Charm vertical factor set to: %s

tooltip.iska_utils.ancient_tablet.desc0: Strange inscriptions from a forgotten past?
tooltip.iska_utils.ancient_tablet.desc1: They read like the epic of a mad developer.
tooltip.iska_utils.ancient_tablet.desc4: In inventory: §fright-click to take the last item out.
tooltip.iska_utils.arcane_dictionary.des: A tome of unstable arcane traits.
§fShift + right-click: reroll traits (consumes up to %1$s levels of XP).
tooltip.iska_utils.arcane_dictionary.ent: Automatically absorbs Drops of Entropy from your inventory while equipped in Curios.
tooltip.iska_utils.burning_brazier.desc0: Emits a fire so strong that it will permanently light your path
tooltip.iska_utils.burning_brazier.desc1: Left-click in air or on a block to toggle Flame Vision
tooltip.iska_utils.burning_brazier.desc2: Press %s to toggle automatic flame placement
tooltip.iska_utils.burning_brazier.desc3: Right-click flames to remove them and recharge the item
tooltip.iska_utils.cursed_candle.desc0: Emits a cursed fire so strong that it will permanently light your path
tooltip.iska_utils.cursed_candle.desc1: Left-click in air or on a block to toggle Flame Vision
tooltip.iska_utils.cursed_candle.desc2: Press %s to toggle automatic flame placement
tooltip.iska_utils.busted_crown.desc0: No matter who it belonged to:
tooltip.iska_utils.busted_crown.desc2: +%s HP for each cursed artifact worn.
tooltip.iska_utils.chosen_cheese.desc0: After tasting it, you feel reinvigorated.
tooltip.iska_utils.chosen_cheese.desc1: Savor it little by little to keep its benefits.
tooltip.iska_utils.chosen_cheese.desc5: Adds its level to this one; consumes the other.
tooltip.iska_utils.colossal_reactors.rad: Scrub pass every %d ticks: base removal %d x (1 + modules)
Energy per scrub pass: %d RF x (1 + modules) (x2 when also destroying gas)
Does not affect gas destruction (base %d mB/t at 100 RF/t)
tooltip.iska_utils.deep_drawer.desc0: A very large storage block that can only contain non-stackable items
tooltip.iska_utils.deep_drawer.desc1: If it contains items it cannot be broken, use a dolly or similar to move it
tooltip.iska_utils.deep_drawer.desc2: Has an integrated GUI to view and manage its contents
tooltip.iska_utils.deep_drawer.desc3: Supports shift-click insertion and extraction from the GUI
tooltip.iska_utils.deep_drawers.desc0: A very large storage block that can only contain non-stackable items
tooltip.iska_utils.deep_drawers.desc1: If it contains items it cannot be broken, use a dolly or similar to move it
tooltip.iska_utils.deep_drawers.desc2: Has an integrated GUI to view and manage its contents
tooltip.iska_utils.deep_drawers.desc3: Supports shift-click insertion and extraction from the GUI
tooltip.iska_utils.dolly.empty: §7Empty - Shift+Click to pick up a block
tooltip.iska_utils.dolly_creative.empty: §7Empty - Shift+Click to pick up a block
tooltip.iska_utils.dolly_hard.empty: §7Empty - Shift+Click to pick up a block
tooltip.iska_utils.fan_module.press_shif: Press Shift to see where to install it
tooltip.iska_utils.fanpack.desc: §7You combined a Vector Charm with a Modular Fan, what could go wrong?
§7Allows you to climb walls when held in inventory
tooltip.iska_utils.ghost_brazier.desc0: §fA brazier that allows you to temporarily dissolve your body and become a ghost
tooltip.iska_utils.ghost_brazier.desc1: §7Press §e%s §7to toggle between physical and ethereal form
tooltip.iska_utils.gift.place: Place on ground and right-click it!
tooltip.iska_utils.greedy_shield.desc0: §5This ancient shield will try to protect you, but the result is not guaranteed
tooltip.iska_utils.greedy_shield.desc1: Has a %d%% chance to completely block incoming damage
tooltip.iska_utils.greedy_shield.desc2: If the block fails, has a %d%% chance to reduce the damage
tooltip.iska_utils.greedy_shield.desc3: §7When damage is reduced, it blocks %d%% of the damage (%d%% of original damage remains)
tooltip.iska_utils.ice_diamond.desc0: A fake diamond made of ice.
tooltip.iska_utils.ice_diamond.desc2: Repairs your tools, but wears out doing so.
tooltip.iska_utils.mining_equitizer.desc: Artifact for mining in harsh conditions.
Removes penalties in water or while airborne.
Only active when equipped in Curios.
tooltip.iska_utils.necrotic_crystal_hear: it won't let you perish easily.
Only rest heals you, or pain consumes you.
Each time it saves you: -%s max HP.
tooltip.iska_utils.old_brick.desc0: With this you build solid structures.
tooltip.iska_utils.old_brick.desc2: "Back in my day things were done better!"
tooltip.iska_utils.pattern_crafter.produ: Pattern Crafter: max 1, increases how much it processes concurrently
tooltip.iska_utils.pattern_crafter.speed: Pattern Crafter: max %d, reduces crafting time to %d%% of base
tooltip.iska_utils.redstone_activator.de: §7Allows you to emit a temporary redstone signal
tooltip.iska_utils.ritual_gauntlet.desc0: Someone carved cursed runes into it.
tooltip.iska_utils.ritual_gauntlet.desc2: Requires any active potion effect on you.
tooltip.iska_utils.ritual_gauntlet.desc3: On hit: %s chance for bonus critical damage.
tooltip.iska_utils.ritual_gauntlet.desc4: Beneficial or neutral effects: +%s. Harmful effects: +%s.
tooltip.iska_utils.sacred_rubber_sapling: Don't worry, it doesn't grow by itself...
It requires a large dose of fertilizer.
tooltip.iska_utils.sharpened_bone.desc0: Once owned by a god of war.
tooltip.iska_utils.sharpened_bone.desc1: Carrying it makes your blades sharper.
tooltip.iska_utils.sharpened_bone.desc2: %s chance to fully ignore armor (toughness still applies).
Accelerates the machines it is linked to.
Use the Temporal Overclocker Chipset to link it.
tooltip.iska_utils.temporal_overclocker_: Right-click on the Overclocker to activate linking mode, then click on blocks to link them.
Right-click on the Overclocker again to deactivate linking mode.
tooltip.iska_utils.the_deception.desc3: After eating: gain Deceived (1 golden heart).
A rough band of metal, barely wearable.
Smith with an Entropic template and Entropy Crystal.
tooltip.iska_utils.entropic_ring.desc0: With this ring you feel strong and fear nothing anymore.
tooltip.iska_utils.entropic_ring.desc2: Wear in the Curios ring slot.
tooltip.iska_utils.entropic_ring.desc3: +%s damage per 100 HP when your HP is below the target's.
tooltip.iska_utils.runic_dice.desc0: It creates strange optical illusions; sometimes you see it split into copies and merge again.
tooltip.iska_utils.runic_dice.desc1: Wear in the Curios charm slot.
tooltip.iska_utils.runic_dice.desc2: Random attack speed bonus between %1$s and %2$s while equipped.
tooltip.iska_utils.entropic_clock.desc0: A sage once said that time is not a balancing mechanic.
tooltip.iska_utils.entropic_clock.desc1: Install in the %s upgrade slot (open its GUI).
tooltip.iska_utils.ancient_star.desc0: No one can make them anymore; they say one was made by firing a laser at metal infused with 91 nether stars.
tooltip.iska_utils.ancient_star.desc1: Its light shifts with your wounds.
tooltip.iska_utils.totem_of_pain.desc2: On hit (%s): +1 level of Curse of Pain.
Show or hide the collection area behind the crate
tooltip.iska_utils.fan_module.ghost_all_: Allows airflow through all solid blocks (including unbreakable)
tooltip.iska_utils.fan_module.ghost_brea: Allows airflow through solid breakable blocks
tooltip.iska_utils.blazing_altar.range_m: Blazing Altar: +%s chunk radius per module
